root_nodes.title: (Untitled)
root_nodes.summary: COMMERCIAL BANK OF ETHIOPIA NOTES TO THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS FOR THE YEAR ENDED 30 JUNE 2024 (5) FINANCIAL RISK REVIEW - continued (c) Market risk - continued (b) Exchange rate risk: Exchange rate risk is the risk a financial instrument’s value fluctuates as a result of changes in the exchange rates of foreign currencies and other financial variables. Foreign exchange rate risks arise from financial instruments denominated in currencies other than the Bank’s functional currency. The Group’s foreign currency denominated assets and liability accounts may result in translational gain/ loss depending on the net open position and direction of the exchange rate movement.
